# Rippling Official Product + Pricing Pages (2026)

## Summary
Authoritative Rippling product surface as of May 2026. **Resolves OQ-2 definitively: Rippling does NOT publish public pricing.** All pricing is custom-quoted via sales call. Confirms the modular product architecture (HR, IT, Finance, Platform) with each module purchasable separately atop the required core Rippling Platform. Also documents 2026 announcements: Rippling AI (cross-module AI prompts), Rippling Automated Compliance (SOC 2 evidence collection), and App Studio (no-code custom apps).

## Key quotations / statistics
- **Pricing opacity confirmed:** "Most products are billed on a per-employee, per-month basis. Some products have a monthly base fee in addition to per-seat costs. Each product can be purchased separately alongside the required core Rippling Platform. You must request a quote through a form or sales call."
- **Startup offer:** "Qualified venture-backed companies can get 6 free months of Rippling Payroll, HR, IT, and Finance"
- Forrester research cited: "Rippling lifts HR, payroll, and finance efficiency by 42%"
- **HR module suite:** US and Global Payroll, Benefits Admin (FSA/HSA/Commuter), Time & Attendance, LMS, Recruiting/ATS, Scheduling, Headcount Planning, Global Employer of Record (EOR), PEO Services, Performance Management, Surveys, ACA & COBRA Admin, HR Help Desk
- **IT module suite:** Identity & Access Management (IAM/SSO/MFA), Device Management (MDM, zero-touch deployment), Inventory Management (warehousing, shipping, retrieval), **Automated Compliance (SOC 2 evidence collection — new 2026)**
- **Finance (Spend) module suite:** Corporate Cards, Expense Management (100+ countries), Bill Pay
- **Platform layer:** Rippling AI (cross-module), App Studio (no-code custom app builder), Custom Workflows, unified directory and reporting
- **2026 announcements:**
  - **Rippling AI** — prompt-based queries and task delegation across HR/Payroll/IT/Finance; public prompt library at rippling.com/ai-prompt-library
  - **Rippling Automated Compliance** — SOC 2 evidence collection, issue remediation, compliance-readiness running inside Rippling
  - **App Studio** — no-code custom app builder on top of Rippling data
  - **Rippling+** — content/resource hub for HR, IT, finance professionals
- Awards: 4.9 stars on Software Advice, Capterra, GetApp; PC Magazine Editor's Choice

## Annotations for stinger-forge
- **Replace any "Rippling starts at $8/employee/month" claim in `guides/01-platform-selection.md`** with the accurate framing: "Rippling is custom-quoted; typical totals from practitioner data are $20-$30/employee/month for HR + Payroll, more if IT or Finance modules are added." This is critical for setting correct expectations.
- The 6-month free Rippling Payroll/HR/IT/Finance for venture-backed startups is a meaningful acquisition path that may shift the Rippling vs Gusto decision for VC-backed seed/Series A companies — surface in `guides/01-platform-selection.md`
- **Rippling Automated Compliance** is a new IT-side feature that competes with separate SOC 2 tooling (Vanta, Drata) — important context if a company is choosing between Rippling+Vanta vs Rippling+Automated Compliance for compliance posture
- Rippling Global EOR is embedded in the HR module suite — note that this is one of the few unified platforms where domestic payroll + EOR run on the same data layer (vs Gusto+Deel which requires two systems)
- The PEO Services module (separate from EOR) means Rippling can serve both EOR and PEO use cases under one roof — verify pricing parity with Justworks PEO ($79-$109) before recommending Rippling PEO over Justworks
